description: Google Trends MCP with proxy rotation, auto-retry on Google blocks, residential-proxy setup.
name: io.github.den-indance/google-trends-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Single rotating proxy endpoint (e.g. http://user:pass@gate.smartproxy.com:7000). Provider handles IP rotation.
environmentVariables.name: PROXY_URL

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated proxy list (http://user:pass@host:port,...). Validated on startup, bad ones auto-dropped.
environmentVariables.name: PROXY_LIST

environmentVariables.description: Path to a file with one proxy URL per line (# comments allowed). Validated on startup, re-read on proxy_refresh.
environmentVariables.name: PROXY_LIST_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Set to false to disable proxy logic and use direct requests. Default: enabled.
environmentVariables.name: PROXIES_ENABLED
